# sharpness

**Instance Property**

The amount that the shape overlaps with bordering subbands.

## Declaration

```swift
var sharpness: Double { get set }
```

## Discussion

This property condenses the shape of the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASECardioidDirectivityModelSubbandParameters/pattern] such that higher values extend the shape frontwards. Increasing sharpness for dipole (a [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASECardioidDirectivityModelSubbandParameters/pattern] value of `1.0`), extends the shape frontwards and backwards.

The default value is `1.0`. Values greater than `1.0` increase sharpness. The framework clamps the value to the range `[1.0,` [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/Double/greatestFiniteMagnitude]`]`.

## Shaping Directivity

- **pattern**: A shape that determines the direction of sound.
